segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Excuse me, my suitcase still hasn't come out. Is this the right carousel for the Seoul flight?

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: It should be. What was your final destination?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Boston. I had a connection before this, but the bag was checked through to Boston.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: It's a black hard-shell suitcase with a blue tag on the handle.

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Give it a few more minutes. If it doesn't show up, head to baggage service.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Got it. If I need to file a delayed baggage report, is that counter right over there?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Can they deliver it to my temporary address if it comes in later?

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Yes. Just put that address and your phone number on the form.
